arts.ttl: Manchester United suffer major Amad injury scare as Ruben Amorim faces nightmare
arts.sum: Amad Diallo is reportedly facing a lengthy injury lay-off after sustaining an injury ahead of Man Utd's trip to Tottenham this weekend.

arts.ttl: Amad Diallo: Man Utd winger suffers season-ending injury
arts.sum: Amad Diallo has suffered what could be a season-ending ankle injury during Man Utd training.

arts.ttl: How does Daniel Levy run Tottenham - and would he ever leave?
arts.sum: With Tottenham struggling on the pitch and chairman Daniel Levy facing criticism from fans, BBC Sport looks at how the club is run and what the future might hold.

arts.ttl: Player reveals concrete interest from Arsenal and Manchester United early in career – Chose different career path
arts.sum: Former Feyenoord favourite Luis Pedro has revealed he turned down approaches from Arsenal and Manchester United early in his career, as he was determined to play for the Dutch club. Feyenoord Pings cover comments from the 34-year-old today made in an interview with Voetbal Primeur’s De Voetbalweek. arts.ttl: Man United star Amad Diallo could be out for the SEASON after suffering injury in training - as Ruben Amorim is hit with devastating blow
arts.sum: It's understood that Diallo was hurt in training and now faces a lengthy lay-off that could keep him out of action for the foreseeable future.

arts.ttl: Alvaro Carreras sends message Man United fans will hate after return transfer links
arts.sum: Alvaro Carreras was linked with a return to Manchester United in the January transfer window as Ruben Amorim looked to strengthen the left side

arts.ttl: Amorim's Onana replacement DELIGHTED with Man Utd interest
arts.sum: Lammens keen on Man Utd “The first time I heard it, I thought: 'Wow, a huge team that follows you!

arts.ttl: Man United dealt TRIPLE injury blow in midfield ahead of Tottenham trip with Kobbie Mainoo to miss several weeks in more misery for Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Mainoo's setback is expected to keep him out for more than a couple of weeks while two other players are both major doubts for Sunday.

arts.ttl: Man Utd staff warned over 'damaging' leaks in furious email on Sir Jim Ratcliffe job cuts
arts.sum: Manchester United are consider more staff cuts with their proposed plans being made public - with an email now going round to inform staff that they are only damaging the club's name

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou offers Man Utd advice over Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou offers Man Utd advice over Ruben Amorim ahead of Tottenham vs Man Utd.
